task_objective: Address code review feedback by running game start and exit preview checks under the service operation lock.
design_decisions: Wrapped check_game_start recency comparison in _run_locked with the internal operation label start_check.
Wrapped check_game_exit backup preview in _run_locked with the internal operation label exit_check.
Converted OperationLockedError from those preview checks into the existing skipped operation_running payload shape.
Left _conflict_metadata outside this patch because it is best-effort metadata, catches failures, and falls back without blocking the conflict prompt.
Kept public Python and TypeScript-facing result contracts unchanged.
Noted that a future hardening pass should evaluate serializing every Ludusavi CLI subprocess call, including conflict metadata, diagnostics, version checks, and config probes.

results.red_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_service.py -k "operation_lock or initial_guard or recency_under_operation_lock or preview_under_operation_lock" failed before implementation with 4 expected failures.
results.targeted_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_service.py -k "operation_lock or initial_guard or recency_under_operation_lock or preview_under_operation_lock" passed after implementation.
results.service_tests: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_service.py passed with 91 tests.
results.ruff_format: ./run.sh uv run ruff format . completed with 50 files left unchanged.
results.type_check: ./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ passed.
results.full_tests: ./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 315 tests.
